name: Athi River Industrial Drainage Standards
blocking_factor: Industrial lobby resistance and NEMA-county jurisdiction overlap
notes: Industrial drainage standards gazetted 2018. Compliance rate estimated 35%. Joint NEMA-county inspection programme collapsed 2020.

name: Mavoko Stormwater Master Plan
blocking_factor: Not adopted — new county administration deprioritised
notes: Plan completed with World Bank support 2021. New county government elected 2022 did not adopt. Re-presented to county assembly 2023.

name: SGR-Athi River Corridor Drainage
notes: SGR viaduct drainage channels and culverts designed for 1:100 year flood. Surrounding community drainage not covered.

name: Syokimau Riparian Enforcement
blocking_factor: Rapid residential development on Athi River floodplain
notes: Riparian buffer mapped. Approved residential developments within flood zone documented. County planning approvals not linked to flood risk.

name: Athi River Early Warning
blocking_factor: Industrial area alert chain not established
notes: Gauge on Athi River functional. Residential community alerts via sub-chief network. Industrial zone emergency coordinators not enrolled.
